title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind. It’s {{c1::very difficult to make sense}}(很难理解清楚) of, how can the model, on the one hand, do these amazing things, and then on the other hand, repeat itself twice in some situation?
original: But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind. It’s very difficult to make sense of, how can the model, on the one hand, do these amazing things, and then on the other hand, repeat itself twice in some situation?
translation: 但经济影响似乎远远落后于预期。这很难理解：模型一方面能做出惊人的成就，另一方面却在某些情况下重复自己两次，这究竟是怎么回事？
note:
phrases: very difficult to make sense
title: Ilya-Sutskever

source_lang: en
target_lang: zh

transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.
expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But there is another explanation. Back when people were doing {{c1::pre-training}}(预训练), the question of {{c2::what data to train}}(用什么数据进行训练) on {{c3::was answered}}(得到了回答), {{c4::because that answer}}(因为那个答案) was everything.
original: But there is another explanation. Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything.
translation: 但还有另一种解释。当初人们进行预训练时，关于用什么数据来训练的问题已经有了答案，因为那个答案就是全部数据。
note:
phrases: pre-training | what data to train | was answered | because that answer
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh

title: Ilya-Sutskever

original: They are doing so well. But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind.
translation: 它们表现得非常出色，但经济影响似乎远远落后于预期。

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: {{c1::How to reconcile the fact}}(如何调和这一事实) that they are doing so well on evals? You look at the evals and you go, “Those are pretty hard evals.”
original: How to reconcile the fact that they are doing so well on evals? You look at the evals and you go, “Those are pretty hard evals.”
translation: 如何理解它们在评估中表现得如此出色这一事实呢？你看看这些评估，就会觉得「这些评估真的相当难」。
note:
phrases: How to reconcile the fact

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Ilya Sutskever We get used to things pretty fast, {{c1::it turns out}}(结果发现). But also it’s kind of abstract. What does it mean?
original: Ilya Sutskever We get used to things pretty fast, it turns out. But also it’s kind of abstract. What does it mean?
translation: 伊利亚·苏茨克弗 我们似乎很快就会习惯新事物。但这也相当抽象，到底意味着什么呢？
note:
phrases: it turns out
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0002_2fe0f2
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: discourse_organizer
transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.
expression_transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Another thing that’s crazy is {{c1::how normal the slow takeoff feels}}(缓慢过渡竟然如此正常). The idea that we’d be investing 1% of GDP in AI, I feel like it would have felt like a bigger deal,
original: Another thing that’s crazy is how normal the slow takeoff feels. The idea that we’d be investing 1% of GDP in AI, I feel like it would have felt like a bigger deal,
translation: 另一件令人惊讶的事是，缓慢演进的感觉竟然如此平常。想到我们可能会投入GDP的1%用于人工智能，我原本以为这会是个更大的新闻事件。
note:
phrases: how normal the slow takeoff feels
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: This is one of the {{c1::very confusing things}}(非常令人困惑的事情) about the models right now. How to {{c2::reconcile the fact}}(调和这一事实) that they are {{c3::doing so well}}(表现得如此出色) on evals?
original: This is one of the very confusing things about the models right now. How to reconcile the fact that they are doing so well on evals?
translation: 现在模型最令人困惑的一点就是：如何理解它们在评估中表现得如此出色这一事实？
note:
phrases: very confusing things | reconcile the fact | doing so well

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: All this AI stuff and {{c1::all this Bay Area}}(整个湾区的这一切)… that it’s happening. Isn’t it {{c2::straight out of science fiction}}(简直就像是科幻小说里的情节)?
original: All this AI stuff and all this Bay Area… that it’s happening. Isn’t it straight out of science fiction?
translation: 所有这些人工智能的内容，还有整个湾区……竟然真的发生了，这不就是科幻小说里的情节吗？
note:
phrases: all this Bay Area | straight out of science fiction

original: Ilya Sutskever Don’t you think so? All this AI stuff and all this Bay Area… that it’s happening.
translation: 伊利亚·苏茨克弗 你不觉得吗？所有这些人工智能的内容，还有整个湾区……竟然真的发生了。

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But when people do RL training, they do need to think. They say, “Okay, we want to have {{c1::this kind of RL training}}(这种强化学习训练) for this thing and that kind of RL training for that thing.”
original: But when people do RL training, they do need to think. They say, “Okay, we want to have this kind of RL training for this thing and that kind of RL training for that thing.”
translation: 但当人们进行强化学习训练时，确实需要动脑思考。他们会说：‘好的，我们想要为这件事做这种类型的强化学习训练，为那件事做那种类型的强化学习训练。’
note:
phrases: this kind of RL training
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0009_caedb9
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: strong_collocation
transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.
expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: There’ll be {{c1::very strong economic forces}}(强大的经济力量) for this, and I think the impact is going to be {{c2::felt very strongly}}(感受非常强烈). Dwarkesh Patel When do you expect that impact?
original: There’ll be very strong economic forces for this, and I think the impact is going to be felt very strongly. Dwarkesh Patel When do you expect that impact?
translation: 这背后会有非常强大的经济动力，我认为其影响将会非常显著。杜瓦克什·帕特尔 你预计这种影响什么时候会出现？
note:
phrases: very strong economic forces | felt very strongly
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source:

target_lang: zh
phrase_types: strong_collocation

expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: There are so many degrees of freedom. There is such a huge {{c1::variety of RL environments}}(多种多样的强化学习环境) you could produce.
original: There are so many degrees of freedom. There is such a huge variety of RL environments you could produce.
translation: 自由度如此之多，你可以创造出的强化学习环境种类繁多，简直令人难以置信。
note:
phrases: variety of RL environments

original: But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind. It’s very difficult to make sense of,
translation: 但经济影响却明显滞后，这让人很难理解。

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: You look at the evals and you go, “Those are {{c1::pretty hard evals}}(评估难度相当大).” They are {{c2::doing so well}}(表现得如此出色). But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind.
original: You look at the evals and you go, “Those are pretty hard evals.” They are doing so well. But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind.
translation: 你看看那些评估结果，会发现这些测试其实相当困难。模型表现得非常出色，但经济影响却依然远远落后。
note:
phrases: pretty hard evals | doing so well

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: The more whimsical explanation is that maybe RL training makes the models {{c1::a little too single-minded}}(有点过于专注单一目标了) and {{c2::narrowly focused}}(过于狭隘地聚焦于一点), {{c3::a little bit too unaware}}(有点过于缺乏意识了), even though it also {{c4::makes them aware}}(让他们意识到这一点) in some other ways. Because of this, they can’t do basic things.
original: The more whimsical explanation is that maybe RL training makes the models a little too single-minded and narrowly focused, a little bit too unaware, even though it also makes them aware in some other ways. Because of this, they can’t do basic things.
translation: 一个更天马行空的解释是，强化学习训练可能让模型变得过于专注和狭隘，甚至有些迟钝，尽管它在其他方面也确实变得更敏锐了。正因如此，它们反而无法完成一些基础任务。
note:
phrases: a little too single-minded | narrowly focused | a little bit too unaware | makes them aware
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0007_c84335
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: strong_collocation
transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.
expression_transfer: Useful for producing native-like collocations in formal discussion.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: From what I hear, all the companies have teams that just {{c1::produce new RL environments}}(生成新的强化学习环境) and just {{c2::add it to the training mix}}(将其加入训练组合中). The question is, well, what are those?
original: From what I hear, all the companies have teams that just produce new RL environments and just add it to the training mix. The question is, well, what are those?
translation: 据我所知，所有公司都有专门团队，不断开发新的强化学习环境，并将其加入训练数据中。问题是，这些环境到底是什么样的？
note:
phrases: produce new RL environments | add it to the training mix
title: Ilya-Sutskever

source_lang: en
target_lang: zh

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: You go to some place and then you get a bug. Then you {{c1::tell the model}}(告诉模型), “Can you please fix the bug?”
original: You go to some place and then you get a bug. Then you tell the model, “Can you please fix the bug?”
translation: 你去某个地方，结果发现了一个bug。然后你告诉模型：‘你能帮忙修一下这个bug吗？’
note:
phrases: tell the model
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: I don’t think anyone knows what to do with that. But I think the impact of AI is going to be felt. AI is going to be {{c1::diffused through the economy}}(在经济中扩散开来).
original: I don’t think anyone knows what to do with that. But I think the impact of AI is going to be felt. AI is going to be diffused through the economy.
translation: 我认为没人真正知道该如何应对这种情况。但我想，人工智能的影响将会显现出来，AI将渗透到整个经济体系中。
note:
phrases: diffused through the economy

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: And the model says, “Oh my God, you’re so right. I have a bug. {{c1::Let me go fix}}(让我去修一下) that.” And it introduces a second bug.
original: And the model says, “Oh my God, you’re so right. I have a bug. Let me go fix that.” And it introduces a second bug.
translation: 模型却说：‘天啊，你说得太对了，我确实有个bug，让我去修一下。’结果却引入了第二个bug。
note:
phrases: Let me go fix
